Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion.ResponseAssertion

Packages that use ResponseAssertion
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion
Fluent assertion classes for HTTP response validation in the org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng REST client.

  • Uses of ResponseAssertion in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that return ResponseAssertion
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseAssertion
    RestResponse.assertThat()
    Returns a fluent assertion object for this response.

  • Uses of ResponseAssertion in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.assertion that return ResponseAssertion
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseBodyAssertion.and()
    Returns the parent ResponseAssertion to continue assertion chaining.
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseHeaderAssertion.and()
    Returns the parent ResponseAssertion to continue assertion chaining.
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseAssertion.isClientError()
    Asserts that the response status code is in the 4xx (client error) range.
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseAssertion.isOk()
    Asserts that the response status code is in the 2xx (success) range.
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseAssertion.isServerError()
    Asserts that the response status code is in the 5xx (server error) range.
    ResponseAssertion
    ResponseAssertion.statusCode(int expected)
    Asserts that the response status code equals the expected value.
